summary: Central estimate ~$17.6B for Q4 2025 APAC CC revenue, based on Q4 2024 APAC base of ~$15.7B and ~12% CC growth
content:
Key data points:
- FY2024 APAC revenue: $56.82B (16.2% of $350B total)
- FY2023 APAC: $51.51B, FY2022: $47.02B
- Q4 2024 APAC CC growth: 9% YoY (from Campaign Asia)
- Q4 2024 APAC base (estimated proportional): ~$15.6-15.8B
- Overall Alphabet growth accelerating: Q1 12%, Q2 14%, Q3 16% in 2025
- APAC typically lags overall by 3-5pp
- Estimated APAC CC growth Q4 2025: 10-14% (central 12%)
- Q4 2025 APAC CC estimate: ~$17.3-17.9B (central $17.6B)
- Monte Carlo P10-P90: $16.5-18.7B
